mapper.sql: lcm.LISTENER_GW_ID AS listenerGwId, lcm.LISTENER_SYSTEM_ID AS listenerSystemId, lcm.IDENTIFIER AS identifier, lcm.CONNECTOR_GW_ID AS connectorGwId, lcm.CONNECTOR_SYSTEM_ID AS connectorSystemId, lcm.DESCRIPTION AS description
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_LISTENER_CONNECTOR_MAPPING ( LISTENER_GW_ID, LISTENER_SYSTEM_ID, IDENTIFIER, CONNECTOR_GW_ID, CONNECTOR_SYSTEM_ID, DESCRIPTION ) VALUES ( #{dto.listenerGwId}, #{dto.listenerSystemId}, #{dto.identifier}, #{dto.connectorGwId}, #{dto.connectorSystemId}, #{dto.description} )
mapper.select:
SELECT
ORDER BY lcm.LISTENER_GW_ID, lcm.LISTENER_SYSTEM_ID, lcm.IDENTIFIER

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ${orderColumn} ${orderDir}) AS RN
AND lcm.LISTENER_GW_ID LIKE '%' || #{listenerGwId} || '%'
AND lcm.LISTENER_SYSTEM_ID LIKE '%' || #{listenerSystemId} || '%'
AND lcm.IDENTIFIER LIKE '%' || #{identifier} || '%'
AND lcm.CONNECTOR_GW_ID LIKE '%' || #{connectorGwId} || '%'
AND lcm.CONNECTOR_SYSTEM_ID LIKE '%' || #{connectorSystemId} || '%'
) WHERE RN BETWEEN #{offset} + 1 AND #{offset} + #{limit} ORDER BY RN

SELECT COUNT(*)
AND lcm.LISTENER_GW_ID LIKE '%' || #{listenerGwId} || '%'
AND lcm.LISTENER_SYSTEM_ID LIKE '%' || #{listenerSystemId} || '%'
AND lcm.IDENTIFIER LIKE '%' || #{identifier} || '%'
AND lcm.CONNECTOR_GW_ID LIKE '%' || #{connectorGwId} || '%'
AND lcm.CONNECTOR_SYSTEM_ID LIKE '%' || #{connectorSystemId} || '%'

SELECT
AND lcm.LISTENER_GW_ID LIKE '%' || #{listenerGwId} || '%'
AND lcm.LISTENER_SYSTEM_ID LIKE '%' || #{listenerSystemId} || '%'
AND lcm.IDENTIFIER LIKE '%' || #{identifier} || '%'
AND lcm.CONNECTOR_GW_ID LIKE '%' || #{connectorGwId} || '%'
AND lcm.CONNECTOR_SYSTEM_ID LIKE '%' || #{connectorSystemId} || '%'
ORDER BY ${orderColumn} ${orderDir}
